# add_cdm_name { #cdmconnector.add_cdm_name }

```python
add_cdm_name(table, cdm)
```

Add a column with the CDM name.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type   | Description    | Default    |
|--------|--------|----------------|------------|
| table  | Any    | Ibis table.    | _required_ |
| cdm    | Cdm    | CDM reference. | _required_ |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                  | Description                                    |
|--------|-----------------------|------------------------------------------------|
|        | ibis.expr.types.Table | Table with cdm_name column (literal cdm.name). |
